globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
